name: Redd Holt
abstract: Isaac "Redd" Holt (May 16, 1932 – May 23, 2023) was an American jazz and soul music drummer. He was the drummer on the album The In Crowd which earned the Ramsey Lewis Trio critical praise and the 1965 Grammy Award for Best Jazz Performance.

concerts.label: Ramsey Lewis Trio, Flip Wilson, and the Herbie Mann Octet
Teddy Powell's Holiday Soul of Jazz
Midnight Performance: Teddy Powell's Holiday Soul of Jazz

about_quotes.speaker: Ramsey Lewis
about_quotes.evidence: Redd Holt played drums. Eldee Young played bass. And here I am on piano, seven pieces... Eldee, Redd, and I were sitting in a coffee shop... we made our first album... Redd went off to the war... until Redd got out of the army.
about_quotes.doc_title: Ramsey Lewis — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History
